Title: Successful Login with Valid Credentials
Preconditions: User has valid email and password.
Test Steps:
1. Enter the email address "user@example.com" in the login screen.
2. Enter the password "validpassword".
3. Click on the "Sign In" button.
Expected Result: The user should be successfully logged in and redirected to the HomeActivity.

Title: Failed Login with Invalid Credentials
Preconditions: User has invalid email and password.
Test Steps:
1. Enter the email address "wrongemail@example.com" in the login screen.
2. Enter the password "wrongpassword".
3. Click on the "Sign In" button.
Expected Result: An error message should be displayed indicating incorrect credentials.

Title: Login with Empty Fields
Preconditions: User leaves fields empty.
Test Steps:
1. Leave the email field empty.
2. Leave the password field empty.
3. Click on the "Sign In" button.
Expected Result: An error message should be displayed indicating that both fields are required.

Title: Navigating to Monitoring Section
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the HomeActivity.
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the "Menu" option.
2. Select "Monitoring" from the menu options.
Expected Result: The user should be redirected to the Sezione di monitoraggio section.

Title: Navigating Back to Home from Monitoring Section
Preconditions: User is on the Sezione di monitoraggio section.
Test Steps: 1. Tap on the "Back" button.
Expected Result: The user should be redirected back to the HomeActivity.

Title: Abandoning the Profile Activity
Preconditions: User is on the ProfileActivity.
Test Steps: 1. Tap on the "Abbandona" button.
Expected Result: The user should be signed out and redirected to the LoginActivity.

Title: Displaying Connect Graph View
Preconditions: User is on the GraphConnectFragment.
Test Steps: 1. Call the graphConnectView method.
Expected Result: The connect graph view should be displayed.

Title: Displaying Attamento Graph View
Preconditions: User is on the GraphAttamentoFragment.
Test Steps: 1. Call the graphAttamentoView method.
Expected Result: The attamento graph view should be displayed.

Title: Displaying Crescita Graph View
Preconditions: User is on the GraphCrescitaFragment.
Test Steps: 1. Call the graphCrescitaView method.
Expected Result: The crescita graph view should be displayed.

Title: Navigating to Note Section from Menu
Preconditions: User is on the MenuFragment.
Test Steps: 1. Tap on the "Note" option.
Expected Result: The user should be redirected to the NoteFragment.

Title: Navigating to Edit Note Fragment
Preconditions: User is on the NoteFragment.
Test Steps: 1. Tap on the "Edit" button.
Expected Result: The user should be redirected to the EditNoteFragment.

Title: Navigating to Sonno Fragment
Preconditions: User is on the NoteFragment.
Test Steps: 1. Tap on the "Sonno" option.
Expected Result: The user should be redirected to the SonnoFragment.

Title: Initiating Document Process
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the "Avvia Documento" action.
2. Tap on the "Aggiungi Documento" action.
Expected Result: The document process should start and the user should be able to add documents.

Title: Adding Document to Process
Preconditions: User is on the document process.
Test Data: Document Name: Test Document, Document Description: This is a test document.
Test Steps:
1. Enter the document name "Test Document".
2. Enter the document description "This is a test document".
3. Tap on the "Save" button.
Expected Result: The document should be added to the process and a success message should be displayed.

Title: Adding Invalid Document
Preconditions: User is on the document process.
Test Data: Document Name: , Document Description: This is a test document.
Test Steps:
1. Leave the document name field empty.
2. Enter the document description "This is a test document".
3. Tap on the "Save" button.
Expected Result: An error message should be displayed indicating that the document name is required. The document should not be added to the process.

Title: Adding Document with Empty Description
Preconditions: User is on the document process.
Test Data: Document Name: Test Document, Document Description:
Test Steps:
1. Enter the document name "Test Document".
2. Leave the document description field empty.
3. Tap on the "Save" button.
Expected Result: An error message should be displayed indicating that the document description is required. The document should not be added to the process.

Title: Adding Document with Invalid Characters
Preconditions: User is on the document process.
Test Data: Document Name: Test@Document, Document Description: This is a test document.
Test Steps:
1. Enter the document name "Test@Document".
2. Enter the document description "This is a test document".
3. Tap on the "Save" button.
Expected Result: An error message should be displayed indicating that the document name contains invalid characters. The document should not be added to the process.

Title: Adding Multiple Documents
Preconditions: User is on the document process.
Test Data: Document Name: Doc1, Document Description: Description1 Document Name: Doc2, Document Description: Description2
Test Steps:
1. Enter the document name "Doc1" and description "Description1".
2. Tap on the "Add Another Document" button.
3. Enter the document name "Doc2" and description "Description2".
4. Tap on the "Save" button.
Expected Result: Both documents should be added to the process and a success message should be displayed.

Title: Adding Document with Long Name
Preconditions: User is on the document process.
Test Data: Document Name: A very long document name that exceeds the maximum allowed length, Document Description: This is a test document.
Test Steps:
1. Enter the document name "A very long document name that exceeds the maximum allowed length".
2. Enter the document description "This is a test document".
3. Tap on the "Save" button.
Expected Result: An error message should be displayed indicating that the document name exceeds the maximum allowed length. The document should not be added to the process.

Title: Adding Document with Long Description
Preconditions: User is on the document process.
Test Data: Document Name: Test Document, Document Description: A very long description that exceeds the maximum allowed length.
Test Steps:
1. Enter the document name "Test Document".
2. Enter the document description "A very long description that exceeds the maximum allowed length".
3. Tap on the "Save" button.
Expected Result: An error message should be displayed indicating that the document description exceeds the maximum allowed length. The document should not be added to the process.

Preconditions: User is on the document process.
Test Steps:

3. Tap on the "Save" button.
Expected Result: An error message should be displayed indicating that the document name and description cannot be empty. The document should not be added to the process.

Title: Adding Document with Invalid Date Format
Preconditions: User is on the document process.
Test Data: Document Name: Test Document, Document Description: This is a test document, Date: 15/01/2023
Test Steps:
1. Enter the document name "Test Document".
2. Enter the document description "This is a test document".
3. Enter an invalid date format "15/01/2023" (should be in YYYY-MM-DD format).
4. Tap on the "Save" button.
Expected Result: An error message should be displayed indicating that the date format is invalid. The document should not be added to the process.

Title: Adding Document with Valid Date Format
Preconditions: User is on the document process.
Test Data: Document Name: Test Document, Document Description: This is a test document, Date: 2023-01-15
Test Steps:
1. Enter the document name "Test Document".
2. Enter the document description "This is a test document".
3. Enter a valid date format "2023-01-15".
4. Tap on the "Save" button.
Expected Result: The document should be added to the process and a success message should be displayed.
